``` ```{=html} ``` #Paquetes ipak <- function(pkg){ options(repos = c(CRAN="https://cloud.r-project.org")) new.pkg <- pkg[!(pkg %in% rownames(installed.packages()))] if(length(new.pkg)) install.packages(new.pkg, dependencies = TRUE) invisible(lapply(pkg, function(p) suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(p, character.only = TRUE)) )) } packages <- c("tidyverse","kableExtra","psych","readxl") ipak(packages) ```quarto publish posit-connect-cloud
